industries.educationDesc: Build complete learning management systems with courses, memberships, and certification.
industries.ecommerceDesc: Full-stack commerce infrastructure with inventory, payments, and fulfillment.

industries.clinicDesc: Clinic management with appointments, patient records, and billing.
industries.restaurantDesc: Restaurant operations with ordering, reservations, and kitchen management.

education.subtitle: The first production vertical. Modular blocks for building complete learning platforms.
education.coursesDesc: Structured curriculum engine with versioned content.
education.membershipDesc: Multi-tier access control and subscription management.
education.analyticsDesc: Real-time telemetry on engagement and progress.
education.contentDeliveryDesc: CDN-backed media distribution with access gating.

howItWorks.step3Desc: Review, refine, and confirm architectural decisions.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.developerDesc: Earn 10% commission on platforms you build monthly

onboarding.step1Desc: The Guided Intelligence™ platform that helps you build complete digital systems — from education to e-commerce — without months of development.
onboarding.step2Desc: Select an industry vertical (Education, Gym, Clinic, etc.) and our AI architect Gomaa will design the optimal infrastructure for you.
onboarding.step3Desc: Describe what you need in natural language. Gomaa proposes features, you guide the decisions. Human-led, AI-orchestrated.
onboarding.step4Desc: Configure resources, set your subdomain, and deploy a production-ready platform in minutes — not months.

offer.title: What We Offer
offer.subtitle: From idea to production-ready infrastructure — here's how PLATME takes you there.

pricing.title: Pay Only for What You Use
pricing.subtitle: No fixed plans. You choose the features, storage, and capacity — and pay based on your actual usage.
pricing.model: PLATME doesn't lock you into tiers. You select the features you need, set your storage and user capacity, and your monthly cost is calculated based on exactly what you chose. Scale up or down anytime.
pricing.featuresDesc: Pick only the modules your platform needs. Each feature has a transparent monthly price.
pricing.storageDesc: Choose your storage capacity starting from 50GB. Pay per GB based on your system's rate.
pricing.capacityDesc: Set the maximum number of users. Scale up as your platform grows.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Builders
testimonials.subtitle: What our users say about building with PLATME.
testimonials.quote1: We launched a full LMS in 2 days instead of 6 months. The AI architect understood exactly what we needed.
testimonials.quote2: I built an entire course portal with certifications in one afternoon. My students love the experience.
testimonials.quote3: As a developer, I earn 10% commission on every platform I build for clients. It's a real business model.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about PLATME.
faq.a1: PLATME is a Guided Intelligence™ platform that helps you build complete digital systems — from education to e-commerce — using AI-guided architecture without months of development.
faq.a2: There are no fixed plans. You choose your features, storage, and user capacity, and your monthly cost is calculated based on your exact selections. You only pay for what you use.
faq.a3: No. You describe what you need in natural language, and our AI architect Gomaa designs the optimal infrastructure for you. You guide the decisions, the AI handles the complexity.
faq.q4: Can I change my platform after deployment?
faq.a4: Yes. You can add or remove features, adjust storage, and scale user capacity at any time. Your pricing updates automatically.
faq.a5: Developers can earn 10% monthly commission on platforms they build for clients. Enable the developer account from your dashboard to start earning.
faq.a6: Education is fully live now. E-commerce, Gym, Clinic, and Restaurant systems are coming soon. Each vertical comes with specialized features and workflows.
